author: lowshot
description: Connect AI providers to Obsidian notes and review vault file actions before applying them. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: lowshot
manifest.description: Connect AI providers to your notes and review file actions before applying them.
manifest.name: Note Pilot

name: Note Pilot

releases.author: lowshot31
releases.description:
Initial community release of Note Pilot.
Highlights

    Ask AI providers about the current note or selected text.
    Supports openai-oauth, OpenAI-compatible providers, Anthropic Claude, OpenRouter, Groq, Gemini API, DeepSeek, Ollama/local, and custom endpoints.
    Review AI-proposed file actions before applying changes.
    Open ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini webviews from Obsidian.
    Includes privacy and security disclosures for provider network use and reviewed file writes.

Verification

    Local test suite passes.
    Release check passes for manifest/package/version consistency.

releases.author: lowshot31
releases.description:
Initial community release of Note Pilot.

## Highlights

- Ask AI providers about the current note or selected text.
- Supports openai-oauth, OpenAI-compatible providers, Anthropic Claude, OpenRouter, Groq, Gemini API, DeepSeek, Ollama/local, and custom endpoints.
- Review AI-proposed file actions before applying changes.
- Open ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini webviews from Obsidian.
- Includes privacy and security disclosures for provider network use and reviewed file writes.

## Verification

- Local test suite passes.
- Release check passes for manifest/package/version consistency.
